text: Which verb collocates with 'research' in academic writing?
hint: C1: 'Conduct research' – eng keng tarqalgan akademik kollokatsiya.

text: Choose the correct collocation: 'She ____ a speech at the conference.'
hint: C1: 'Give a speech' – nutq so'zlamoq.

text: Which adjective collocates with 'chance' meaning 'very small possibility'?
hint: C1: 'Slim chance' – ozgina imkoniyat.

text: Choose the correct collocation: 'He ____ a serious crime.'
hint: C1: 'Commit a crime' – jinoyat qilmoq.

text: Which verb collocates with 'attention' in formal writing?
hint: C1: 'Pay attention', 'give attention', 'draw attention' – all correct.

text: Choose the correct collocation: 'The company ____ a profit this year.'
hint: C1: 'Make a profit' – foyda qilmoq.

text: Which noun collocates with 'heavy'?
hint: C1: 'Heavy rain', 'heavy traffic', 'heavy smoker'.

text: Choose the correct collocation: 'She ____ no attention to the warning.'
hint: C1: 'Pay attention to' – e'tibor bermoq.

text: Which verb collocates with 'a complaint'?
hint: C1: 'Make a complaint', 'lodge a complaint', 'file a complaint'.

text: Choose the correct collocation: 'He ____ a good reputation.'
hint: C1: 'Build a reputation', 'establish a reputation', 'earn a reputation'.

text: Which adjective collocates with 'decision' meaning 'very important'?
hint: C1: All mean 'very important' with 'decision'.

text: Choose the correct collocation: 'She ____ a strong impression on me.'
hint: C1: 'Make an impression' – taassurot qoldirmoq.

text: Which verb collocates with 'a fortune'?
hint: C1: 'Make a fortune', 'earn a fortune', 'amass a fortune'.

text: Choose the correct collocation: 'The price ____ from $10 to $20.'
hint: C1: All mean 'to become higher'.

text: Which noun collocates with 'heavy' meaning 'alcoholic'?
hint: C1: 'Heavy drinker' – spirtli ichimliklarni ko'p iste'mol qiluvchi.

text: Choose the correct collocation: 'He ____ a valid point during the discussion.'
hint: C1: 'Make a point' – fikr bildirmoq.

text: Which verb collocates with 'a goal'?
hint: C1: 'Achieve a goal', 'reach a goal', 'attain a goal'.

text: Choose the correct collocation: 'She ____ a strong relationship with her clients.'
hint: C1: All are possible with 'relationship'.

text: Which adjective collocates with 'failure' meaning 'complete'?
hint: C1: 'Total failure', 'complete failure', 'utter failure'.

text: Choose the correct collocation: 'He ____ a new record.'
hint: C1: 'Set a record', 'break a record', 'make a record'.

text: Which verb collocates with 'an excuse'?
hint: C1: 'Make an excuse', 'give an excuse', 'provide an excuse'.

text: Choose the correct collocation: 'The results are ____ with previous studies.'
hint: C1: 'Consistent with', 'compatible with', 'in line with'.

text: Which noun collocates with 'bitter'?
hint: C2: 'Bitter disappointment', 'bitter cold', 'bitter enemy'.

text: Choose the correct collocation: 'She ____ a high standard of work.'
hint: C1: 'Set a standard' – standart belgilamoq.

text: Which verb collocates with 'a risk'?
hint: C1: 'Take a risk', 'run a risk', 'assume a risk'.

text: Choose the correct collocation: 'The company ____ bankruptcy.'
hint: C1: 'Declare bankruptcy', 'file for bankruptcy'.

text: Which adjective collocates with 'opportunity'?

text: Choose the correct collocation: 'He ____ a strong case for the defense.'

text: Which verb collocates with 'a contribution'?

text: Choose the correct collocation: 'She ____ a logical conclusion.'

text: Which noun collocates with 'deep'?

text: Choose the correct collocation: 'The plan ____ into action.'

text: Which verb collocates with 'a promise'?

text: Choose the correct collocation: 'He ____ a new theory.'

text: Choose the correct collocation: 'She ____ a difficult time.'
